emails.subject: FW: GTC vs. Master
emails.body: FW: GTC vs. Master FYI trumped already. To: Presto, Kevin M.

emails.subject: RE: GTC vs. Master
emails.body: RE: GTC vs. Master that's fine. that's how eol worked. it is a take it or leave it gtc from what i understand. if people take it and we limit them to shorter term deals we should be fine. To: Belden, Tim

emails.subject: RE: GTC vs. Master
emails.body: Maybe. If we truly believe this is a credit starved industry with huge liquidity problems, then we should be able to dictate the terms for dealing with a AA entity........ end of story. We should send this message early and often. If we don't, the market will percieve that negotiating "one-off" terms for trading docs is acceptable. I disagree with this approach from a long term philosophical standpoint. We either believe our bullshit or we don't.
